issues.title: Add data-testid hooks to Ideas app components
issues.body:
## Summary
Add stable `data-testid` selectors to high-traffic Ideas UI elements before writing specs. Selector-by-text is fragile against copy/style changes; this is a small, surgical, no-behavior-change PR that the rest of the e2e effort depends on.

## Scope
Update the following components in `apps/web/app/apps/ideas/`:
- `ideas-app.tsx`
- `idea-form-modal.tsx`
- `row-menu.tsx`
- `status-dropdown.tsx`
- card/list view components

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `idea-card`, `idea-card-title`, `idea-card-score` testids present on the card surface
- [ ] `new-idea-button`, `idea-form`, `idea-form-title-input`, `idea-form-submit` testids on form/modal
- [ ] `quick-filter-${key}` testids on each Quick Filter button (needs-rating, quick-wins, top-rated, new-today)
- [ ] `category-pill-${name}`, `show-filter-${key}`, `sort-${key}` testids on filter/sort controls
- [ ] `view-toggle-grid` and `view-toggle-list` testids on the view switcher
- [ ] `snooze-menu`, `snooze-1d`, `snooze-1w`, `snooze-2w`, `snooze-1mo`, `snooze-show` testids on the snooze submenu
- [ ] `hide-button`, `restore-button`, `delete-confirm` testids on row-menu actions
- [ ] No visual regression — manually verify on `/apps/ideas` that the page renders identically
- [ ] No new behavior, no new dependencies, no test changes in this PR
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: Create tests/e2e/helpers/ideas.ts DB seed/cleanup helpers
issues.body:
## Summary
Add service-role Supabase helpers that let specs reach a deterministic starting state (e.g. "5 ideas with mixed status/rating/snooze") without driving the UI. Reaching that state through the UI is slow and brittle.

## Location
`apps/web/tests/e2e/helpers/ideas.ts`

## API
```ts
export async function seedIdea(userId: string, partial?: Partial<IdeaRow>): Promise<Idea>
export async function seedIdeas(userId: string, count: number, factoryFn?: (i: number) => Partial<IdeaRow>): Promise<Idea[]>
export async function getIdea(id: string): Promise<Idea | null>
export async function listIdeasForUser(userId: string): Promise<Idea[]>
export async function deleteIdeasForUser(userId: string): Promise<void>
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Uses the existing service-role client pattern from `tests/e2e/helpers/db.ts` (do not duplicate the client)
- [ ] `seedIdea` returns the inserted row with all fields hydrated, accepts overrides for title/description/category/tags/sourceUrl/status/rating/feasibility/impact/effort/snoozedUntil/hiddenAt
- [ ] `seedIdeas` supports a factory callback for varied fixtures and resolves in parallel
- [ ] `getIdea` and `listIdeasForUser` return current DB state for read-after-write assertions
- [ ] `deleteIdeasForUser` removes all rows for the user; safe to call when user has zero ideas
- [ ] All helpers respect RLS by using service role; never call from the browser or test page context
- [ ] Types come from `@repo/db` (no hand-rolled `IdeaRow`)
- [ ] Smoke unit test: insert → read → delete round-trip against a real DB
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: Provision pro-tier E2E user and entitlement env vars
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a second Auth0 test user that holds the `ideas:ai-plan` entitlement so we can exercise both upgrade-dialog and entitled-user paths in `ai-plan.spec.ts`. The free-tier user is already wired up in `auth.fixture.ts`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New env vars declared and consumed: `E2E_TEST_USER_PRO_EMAIL`, `E2E_TEST_USER_PRO_PASSWORD`, `E2E_TEST_USER_PRO_ID`
- [ ] Vars added to `turbo.json` `globalEnv` (per CLAUDE.md non-negotiable)
- [ ] Vars added to `.env.local.example` with placeholder values and a comment
- [ ] GitHub Actions secrets created for CI (note for reviewer; not committed)
- [ ] New `loggedInProPage` fixture in `tests/e2e/fixtures/auth.fixture.ts` that authenticates as the pro user with its own `storageState` file (e.g. `.auth/pro-user.json`)
- [ ] Pro user provisioned in Auth0 (manual step documented in `tests/e2e/README.md` or equivalent)
- [ ] `seedPermission` for `ideas:ai-plan` entitlement helper covers the pro user flow
- [ ] No secrets committed
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas access & gating (Group A)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/access.spec.ts` covering authentication, permission, and entitlement gating for `/apps/ideas`.

## Test cases
1. Unauth visitor → `/apps/ideas` redirects to login
2. Auth user without `ideas` permission → unauthorized page renders
3. Auth user with `ideas:edit` permission → page renders with header `💡 Ideas`
4. User without `ideas:ai-plan` entitlement → clicking `✨ Plan & score with AI` opens the upgrade dialog
5. User with `ideas:ai-plan` entitlement → button does NOT show upgrade dialog

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `beforeAll` uses `seedPermission(userId, "ideas", "edit")`; `afterAll` removes it
- [ ] Reuses `loggedInPage` and `loggedInProPage` fixtures (no new auth fixtures invented)
- [ ] Unauth case uses an unauthenticated context (fresh `browser.newContext()`)
- [ ] Selectors use the testids added in #1, fall back to role/aria where testid is not warranted
- [ ] Each test passes locally and against `next start` in CI mode
- [ ] No flake on 10 consecutive runs (`--repeat-each=10`)
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas CRUD (Group B)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/crud.spec.ts` covering Create, Edit, and Delete server-action flows end-to-end (UI → action → DB).

## Test cases
6. Open `+ New Idea` modal → modal renders centered, title field empty
7. Submit empty title → inline error "Title is required"; assert no DB row created
8. Create with title only → row appears in grid; assert DB row exists via `getIdea`
9. Create with full payload (title/description/category/tags/sourceUrl) → all fields persisted; tags parsed CSV → array
10. Open edit modal on existing idea → fields populated, including feasibility/impact/effort
11. Edit and save → DB updated; optimistic UI shows new values immediately
12. Cancel edit → no DB write; modal closes
13. Delete via row menu → confirm dialog → DB row removed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `beforeAll` seeds `ideas:edit` permission; `afterEach` calls `deleteIdeasForUser` for isolation
- [ ] Read-after-write assertions go through `getIdea` / `listIdeasForUser` (don't trust the UI alone)
- [ ] Tag CSV parsing assertion compares array equality, not string equality
- [ ] Confirm dialog interaction uses the `delete-confirm` testid from #1
- [ ] No flake on 10 consecutive runs
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas status & rating (Group C)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/status-rating.spec.ts` covering the inline status dropdown and star-rating control, plus the optimistic-update rollback path.

## Test cases
14. Status change new → in-progress → persisted, visible in card label
15. Click 4 stars → rating persists, derived score updates
16. Click same star count twice → rating clears to 0/null
17. Optimistic-update rollback on server error — mock action failure, assert UI reverts and error toast/inline message

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Seed a single idea per test via `seedIdea`; assert state via `getIdea`
- [ ] Star widget tested both via mouse and keyboard activation
- [ ] Test 17 mocks the server action response (e.g. via `page.route` on the action endpoint, or by temporarily bad-stating the row so the action throws)
- [ ] After rollback, DB state matches pre-click state
- [ ] `afterEach` cleans up via `deleteIdeasForUser`
- [ ] No flake on 10 consecutive runs
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas hide & snooze (Group D)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/hide-snooze.spec.ts` covering hide/restore and snooze/show-now flows including the snoozed indicator.

## Test cases
18. Hide via `✕` → idea moves out of Active view, lands in Hidden (n) filter
19. Restore from hidden → returns to active
20. Snooze 1 week → idea moves to Snoozed view, `snoozedUntil` set ~7 days out
21. `Show Now` from snooze menu → returns to active, `snoozedUntil` cleared
22. Snoozed indicator/opacity rendered on the card while snoozed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `snoozedUntil` assertion allows for clock skew (within ±1 hour of expected)
- [ ] Hidden filter count assertion matches DB count for hidden rows
- [ ] Test 22 uses computed-style assertion on the card's opacity (not a screenshot diff)
- [ ] Seed varied state (some active, some snoozed, some hidden) in `beforeEach`
- [ ] `afterEach` cleans up via `deleteIdeasForUser`
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas filters, search & sort (Group E)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/filters-search.spec.ts` covering search, quick filters, category pills, sort, and show-filter counts.

## Test cases
23. Search by title → list narrows to matches
24. Search by tag → matched
25. Search empty state — no match → EmptyState component renders
26. Quick filter `Needs Rating` → only rows with null/0 rating
27. Quick filter `Quick Wins` → feasibility ≥ 7 + Low effort
28. Quick filter `Top Rated` → sorted by rating desc
29. Quick filter `New Today` → only items created < 24h ago
30. Category pill `Product` → only Product rows
31. Sort by Rating → toggle asc/desc, arrow indicator + DB-verified order
32. Show filter Snoozed/Completed/Hidden/All counts match DB counts

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Seed a deterministic mix of ~10 ideas in `beforeEach` covering edges (low/high feasibility, varied effort, multiple categories, mix of timestamps)
- [ ] Use `seedIdea` overrides for `createdAt` to deterministically populate `New Today` and "older than today" buckets — no `setTimeout` or wall-clock hacks
- [ ] Filter assertions check count AND identities (so a wrong-but-same-cardinality result still fails)
- [ ] No flake on 10 consecutive runs
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas view modes (Group F)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/views.spec.ts` covering the grid ↔ list view toggle and confirming actions still work in both.

## Test cases
33. Toggle list view → list rows render with same row actions (status, rating, hide, snooze)
34. Toggle back to grid → cards render

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] In list view, exercise at least one mutating action (e.g. status change) and read back via `getIdea`
- [ ] Assert preferred-view persistence if implemented (otherwise document as not-applicable)
- [ ] Uses `view-toggle-grid` / `view-toggle-list` testids from #1
- [ ] No flake on 10 consecutive runs
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas AI plan & rate-limit (Group G)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/ai-plan.spec.ts` covering the entitled AI-plan path and the rate-limit error surface. Gated by the pro-user fixture from #3.

## Test cases
35. With `ideas:ai-plan` entitlement: trigger plan on an idea → plan section populates. Either mock the model response, or run against a fixed prompt with stable assertion targets via `data-testid="plan-caption"`.
36. Rate-limited path → user-visible error after N invocations (matches `RateLimitedError` from the Ideas plan action)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Uses `loggedInProPage` from #3
- [ ] Either: (a) mock the AI provider via `page.route` on the AI Gateway endpoint, or (b) use the local-dev stub fallback documented in milestone 021. Document the choice in the spec header.
- [ ] Test 35 asserts on the plan markdown rendering (`data-testid="plan-caption"` or equivalent), not on raw model output
- [ ] Test 36 deterministically triggers the rate limit (e.g. by seeding the rate-limit Redis key, or by burst-invoking until threshold) and asserts the error surface text is user-visible
- [ ] Skipped (not failed) in CI when `E2E_TEST_USER_PRO_*` env vars are missing — log a clear message
- [ ] `afterEach` cleans up the seeded idea and any rate-limit state
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: E2E spec: Ideas modal centering & a11y regression (Group H)
issues.body:
## Summary
Write `apps/web/tests/e2e/ideas/modal-centering.spec.ts` as an explicit regression guard for the modal-centering bug fixed 2026-04-30 (Tailwind scan caused the modal to render misaligned). Also covers keyboard a11y for the form modal.

## Test cases
37. Open `+ New Idea` modal → assert computed-style centering: modal's bounding rect is horizontally and vertically centered within the viewport (within ±2px tolerance)
38. Keyboard: pressing `Esc` closes modal; `Tab` order through form fields matches the visual order; first focusable element receives focus when modal opens

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Centering uses `page.evaluate(() => getBoundingClientRect())` against the modal element, not a screenshot diff
- [ ] Asserts at two viewport sizes (e.g. 1280×800 and 375×812) so a regression at one breakpoint is caught
- [ ] Tab order test does not rely on `waitForTimeout` — uses focus-change events / `expect.poll` if needed
- [ ] Spec header comment links back to the fix commit/PR for the 2026-04-30 bug
- [ ] No flake on 10 consecutive runs
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App

issues.title: Wire Ideas e2e into pnpm script and CI workflow
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a runnable `test:e2e` script and integrate the Ideas e2e suite into the existing CI workflow so it runs on every PR.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `apps/web/package.json` exposes `test:e2e` → `playwright test` (only add if not already present)
- [ ] `pnpm --filter web test:e2e` runs the full Ideas suite locally against a reused dev server
- [ ] CI workflow runs `next build && next start` per the existing `webServer.command` flow and executes the suite
- [ ] CI surfaces Playwright HTML report on failure (artifact upload)
- [ ] `APP_SELF_ENROLL_SLUGS` env in CI either includes `ideas` OR the workflow explicitly relies on `seedPermission` — pick one approach and document it in `tests/e2e/README.md`
- [ ] Pro-user specs are conditionally skipped when `E2E_TEST_USER_PRO_*` env vars are absent (no hard CI failure)
- [ ] CI run time for the Ideas suite is documented in the PR description
- [ ] Suite passes 3 consecutive CI runs with no flake before merge
issues.milestone: 021 - Ideas App — Promotion to Standalone Mini-App
